pages.text: The $(thing)Storage Terminal$() is your primary interface to the network. It displays a dynamic grid of stored items, from $(thing)3 to 9 rows$() depending on window height, with a scroll bar for browsing.

$(thing)Taking items:$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Left-click$() a stack to pick up the full stack.$(li)$(thing)Right-click$() to pick up half the stack.$(li)$(thing)Shift-click$() to move the full stack to your inventory.$(li)$(thing)Scroll wheel$() or drag the scroll bar to browse all items.

$(thing)Putting items:$()$(br)$(li)$(thing)Shift-click$() items from your inventory to insert them into the network.$(br2)$(thing)Search bar:$() Type at the top to filter displayed items. Search is case-insensitive and supports normal text, $(thing)#tag$(), and $(thing)@mod$() modes via the search-mode button.$(br2)$(thing)Tooltips:$() Hover over any visible item to see its full name and count.

The Storage Terminal is $(thing)Tier 1$() - it handles basic item transfer but does not include crafting features.$(br2)For crafting capabilities, upgrade to the $(l:magic_storage:crafting_terminal)$(thing)Crafting Terminal$()$(). For remote access, check out the $(l:magic_storage:remote_terminal)$(thing)Remote Terminal$()$().
